description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to main, on pull requests to any branch, and on a weekly schedule. The workflow has three jobs: build, no-optional-deps, and upstream-dev. The build job runs on a matrix of Python versions 3.8, 3.9, 3.10 and OS ubuntu-latest, setting up a Miniconda environment, installing dependencies, running tests with pytest and coverage, and uploading coverage to Codecov. The no-optional-deps and upstream-dev jobs run on ubuntu-latest, setting up a Miniconda environment and running tests with pytest.
